pre_tournament_reminder.subject: 🎾 Your CourtSide Club match day is almost here!
pre_tournament_reminder.body:
Hey {{ user.first_name }},

Just a heads-up — your visit to {{ tournament_name }} is coming up!

✅ Don't forget your lanyard
✅ Check your session selections
✅ Invite a friend if they're coming too

👉 courtsideclub.com/login

Want tips, guides, and fan updates? Visit the Blog →

Have a great time —
The Lounge is Courtside.

lanyard_reminder.subject: 🎾 Updated lanyard reminder subject
lanyard_reminder.body:
Hey {{ user.first_name }},

This is an updated template test.

The Lounge is Courtside.

tournament_summary.subject: 🎾 Tournament Summary Update
tournament_summary.body:
Hey {{ user.first_name }},

We've updated tournament summaries with fresh content about upcoming events.

Check out the latest information at {{ tournament_name }}.

Want tips, guides, and fan updates? Visit the Blog →

—
The Lounge is Courtside.

post_event_followup.subject: 🎾 Thanks for being part of CourtSide Club at {{ tournament_name }}!
post_event_followup.body:
Hey {{ user.first_name }},

We hope you had an unforgettable time at {{ tournament_name }}.

You weren't the only one — over {{ total_attending }} CSC members went too!

Already thinking about your next event? We'd love to have you back.

Want tips, guides, and fan updates? Visit the Blog →

—
The Lounge is Courtside.
